title: pump operation
description: Incompressible-liquid pump. Given the shaft power and efficiency, the discharge pressure P_in + eta·W_shaft/(F·v_molar) and the small dissipation temperature rise follow from the energy balance.

W_shaft.title: Shaft power
W_shaft.description: Mechanical power delivered to the liquid (positive).

eta.title: Pump efficiency
eta.description: Hydraulic and mechanical efficiency, useful v·dP work / shaft work (0 < eta <= 1). The (1-eta) fraction heats the liquid.
